# Stick Slip

**Summary**: A form of torsional vibration where the drill string periodically accelerates and decelerates.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] monitored stick slip to assess its impact on drilling dynamics.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] High stick slip leads to accelerated bit wear.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Stick slip was observed in several wells, often correlating with high torque fluctuations. ([[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022, p. 59]])
